nasb.text: The Lord said, “Because they have forsaken My law which I set before them, and have not obeyed My voice nor walked according to it,

esv.text: And the Lord says: “Because they have forsaken my law that I set before them, and have not obeyed my voice or walked in accord with it,

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“這是因為他們離棄了我擺在他們面前的律法，不聽從我的話，沒有遵行我的律法；

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“这是因为他们弃绝我赐给他们的律法，不听从我的话，不遵守我的命令，
